texto: Man had created God in his own image, not the other way around. He had done it through sheer terror, and who could blame him? Unfortunately he had made too good a job. The god he had invented was just as cruel and careless as man himself. Not a deity to whom one should seriously address a prayer.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Richard Herley que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Man had created God in his own image, not the other way around. He had done it through sheer terr…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, atheism, created, com foco em reflexao.
